name: Prompt Library
description: Browse your saved prompts by name and tag, then drop one into your message draft with a click.

permissions.reason: Reads your saved prompts and preferred tag so the library shows the right prompts for you.
Remembers your most recent prompt and how often you open the library on this device.
Checks whether your message box already has text before adding a prompt.
Adds the prompt you pick to your message box.
Confirms when a prompt has been added to your message box.
Adds Prompt Library to the Extensions navigation.
Opens the prompt library in a full page.

snippets.title: Your prompts
snippets.description: One prompt per line, written as: tag :: name :: prompt. The tag groups prompts, the name shows on the card, and the prompt is what gets added to your draft.
snippets.default:
writing :: Release note :: Write a concise release note for these changes.
review :: PR review :: Review this diff for bugs, regressions, and missing tests.
planning :: Next actions :: Turn these notes into a clear next-action list.

activeTag.title: Default tag
activeTag.description: The tag the library filters to when it opens. Leave blank to show all prompts.

workspaceItems.title: Prompt Library
workspaceItems.label: Prompts
workspaceItems.description: Find and insert your saved prompts.
